arts.ttl: Fulham consider signing Coventry City player this month – Everton have also been keen
arts.sum: There’s a claim in the Dutch media that Fulham are the latest club to show interest in Coventry City defender Milan van Ewijk. The Dutchman has impressed for the Championship side and subsequently been linked with other clubs, and is of interest to Fulham and Everton. arts.ttl: Liam Manning sheds light on Ayman Benarous and Adam Murphy's position amid Bristol City absence
arts.sum: Liam Manning has confirmed that Ayman Benarous is "heading in the right direction" as he looks to overcome his latest injury setback but admits Adam Murphy may not play first-team football for Bristol City this season. Bristol City Live is now on WhatsApp and we want you to join our community.
